description_long: This auto repair shop is a rectangular, single-story commercial building with a flat roof and a prominent front facade. The front features a large garage opening, a blue door, and a red accent, with a sign above the entrance indicating the business name and services. The structure is attached to a wide, L-shaped paved area, likely serving as a driveway or parking lot for vehicles awaiting service. The exterior is primarily light gray, with some colored elements for functional and visual distinction. The rear and sides of the building are plain, with minimal architectural detailing and no visible windows or additional doors. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on function and accessibility for vehicles and customers.
description: A rectangular, single-story auto repair shop with a flat roof, large garage opening, and attached L-shaped driveway, featuring a business sign and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main garage opening, blue door, red accent, and business signage above the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth and the extension of the L-shaped driveway, with minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with no visible doors or windows, and the full width of the attached driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the building's length and the continuation of the driveway, with no additional entrances.
attribute_signage: A rectangular sign above the main garage entrance with text indicating the business name and services.
attribute_garage_doors: 1 large roll-up garage door at the front, likely metal, approximately 3m high by 4m wide.
